programs.title: America 250th Anniversary Coins: Enduring Liberty Half Dollars
programs.desc: Join Mike Mezack for a special presentation of the 1776-2026 Enduring Liberty Half Dollars-one-year-only U.S. Mint issues honoring America's 250th Anniversary, including rare rolls and certified MS67 collectibles.
